About Features Internships Placements Contact Login Register

Welcome to CampusConnect

Your gateway to campus resources, updates, and opportunities.

Login Register

About

CampusConnect is a one-stop portal designed for students, admins, and HRs to streamline campus activities, notices, internships, placements and more.

Features

  • 📚 View and Upload Class Notes
  • 📢 Notices and Announcements
  • 🎉 Event Listings
  • 🎯 Placement & Internship Opportunities
  • 👤 Role-Based Dashboards

Internship Opportunities

Explore valuable internship opportunities and build your career while studying.

View Internships

Placement Drives

Stay informed about the latest placement drives and company visits on your campus.

Explore Placements

Contact Us

📍 GLA University, Mathura
